title: Verified user can log in successfully
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password meeting all rules
User has verified their email within 24 hours via the verification link
User's email verification status is confirmed as 'verified' in the system database
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter the correct password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
expected_results: The system authenticates the user successfully
The user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
No error messages are displayed

title: Login with unverified email should fail
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password meeting all rules
User has NOT verified their email
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter the correct password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating email is not verified
The user is not redirected to the dashboard or home page
The user remains on the login page

title: Login with incorrect password should show error
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password meeting all rules
User has verified their email within 24 hours via the verification link
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter an incorrect password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating invalid credentials
The user is not redirected to the dashboard or home page
The user remains on the login page

title: Login with non-existent email should show error
preconditions: No user account exists with the email to be used
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter a non-existent email address in the email field
Enter any password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating invalid credentials or user not found
The user is not redirected to the dashboard or home page
The user remains on the login page

title: Login with password exactly 8 characters (valid) should succeed
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password of exactly 8 characters meeting all rules
User has verified their email within 24 hours via the verification link
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter the password of exactly 8 characters in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
expected_results: The system authenticates the user successfully
The user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
No error messages are displayed

title: Login with password exactly 12 characters (valid) should succeed
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password of exactly 12 characters meeting all rules
User has verified their email within 24 hours via the verification link
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter the password of exactly 12 characters in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
expected_results: The system authenticates the user successfully
The user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
No error messages are displayed

title: Login after verification link has expired should fail
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password meeting all rules
User has verified their email but the verification link has expired (more than 24 hours have passed)
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter the correct password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating the verification link has expired
The user is not redirected to the dashboard or home page
The user remains on the login page

title: Login with multiple failed attempts should trigger lockout or rate limiting
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password meeting all rules
User has verified their email within 24 hours via the verification link
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter an incorrect password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Repeat steps 1-3 for a total of 5 consecutive failed attempts
On the 6th attempt, enter the correct password
expected_results: After 5 failed attempts, the system displays a lockout or rate limiting error message
The user is not redirected to the dashboard or home page
The user remains on the login page

title: Login failure should display meaningful inline error message
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password meeting all rules
User has verified their email within 24 hours via the verification link
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter an incorrect password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
expected_results: The system displays a meaningful inline error message near the password field
The error message clearly indicates that the credentials are invalid
The user is not redirected to the dashboard or home page
The user remains on the login page
